intro: Myrtoleucodendron aspalathodes, commonly known as Rooibos, is a type of plant native to South Africa that belongs to the legume family. Rooibos is prized for its numerous health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-boosting properties, which make it a popular natural remedy for reducing stress and promoting overall well-being. The bioactive constituents of Rooibos include flavonoids, such as aspalathin and nothofagin, as well as polyphenols and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. Rooibos is commonly used to make a range of herbal preparations, including Rooibos tea, Rooibos powder, and Rooibos-infused products, which are often used to soothe digestive issues and promote relaxation.
